mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_NM, AGENT_CD, AGENT_NM, SHOP_CD, SHOP_NM, REAL_SHOP_NM, CPNT_ID, CPNT_NM, CNTPNT_SHOP_CD, CNTPNT_SHOP_NM, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, CANCEL_MOBILE_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, SCAN_ID, AUTH_INFO, IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_ISSU_DATE, IDENTITY_ISSU_REGION, SELF_ISSU_NO, DRIVE_LICNS_NO, RECEIVE_WAY_CD, CANCEL_USE_COMPANY_CD, PAY_AMT, PNLT_AMT, LAST_SUM_AMT, INSTAMT_MNTH_CNT, INSTAMT_MNTH_AMT, BENEFIT_AGREE_YN, CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_YN, ETC_AGREE_YN, MEMO, REG_DATE, REGST_ID, REG_DT, PROC_DT, PROC_CD, REC_YN, RES_CD, RES_MSG, RES_NO, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN, FILE_NM, FILE_MASK_NM ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{managerCd}, #{managerNm}, #{agentCd}, #{agentNm}, #{shopCd}, #{shopNm}, #{realShopNm}, #{cpntId}, #{cpntNm}, #{cntpntShopCd}, #{cntpntShopNm}, #{operTypeCd}, #{cstmrTypeCd}, #{identityCertTypeCd}, #{cancelMobileNo}, #{contractNum}, #{scanId}, #{authInfo}, #{identityTypeCd}, #{identityIssuDate}, #{identityIssuRegion}, #{selfIssuNo}, #{driveLicnsNo}, #{receiveWayCd}, #{cancelUseCompanyCd}, #{payAmt}, #{pnltAmt}, #{lastSumAmt}, #{instamtMnthCnt}, #{instamtMnthAmt}, #{benefitAgreeYn}, #{clauseCntrDelYn}, #{etcAgreeYn}, #{memo}, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), #{regstId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{procCd}, #{recYn}, #{resCd}, #{resMsg}, #{resNo}, #{appFormYn}, #{appFormXmlYn}, #{fileNm}, #{fileMaskNm} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, CSTMR_NM, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_NATIVE_BIRTH, CSTMR_NATIVE_GENDER_CD, CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME, CSTMR_PRIVATE_BIZ_NO, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_GENDER_CD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_COUNTRY_CD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VISA_NO, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VDATE_START_DATE, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VDATE_END_DATE, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIZ_NO, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_REP_NM, UPJN_CD, BCU_SBST, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_USER_NM, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIRTH, CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TEL_FN_NO, CSTMR_TEL_MN_NO, CSTMR_TEL_RN_NO, CSTMR_MOBILE_FN_NO, CSTMR_MOBILE_MN_NO, CSTMR_MOBILE_RN_NO, CSTMR_ZIPCD, CSTMR_ADR, CSTMR_ADR_DTL, CSTMR_ADR_BJD, CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR, CSTMR_EMAIL_RECEIVE_YN, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM_NO, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN_NO ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, '127.0.0.1', NOW(), 'MSF_FORM', '127.0.0.1', NOW(), 'MSF_FORM', #{cstmrNm}, #{cstmrNativeRrn}, #{cstmrNativeBirth}, #{cstmrNativeGenderCd}, #{cstmrPrivateCname}, #{cstmrPrivateBizNo}, #{cstmrForeignerRrn}, #{cstmrForeignerBirth}, #{cstmrForeignerGenderCd}, #{cstmrForeignerPn}, #{cstmrForeignerCountryCd}, #{cstmrForeignerNation}, #{cstmrForeignerVisaNo}, #{cstmrForeignerVdateStartDate}, #{cstmrForeignerVdateEndDate}, #{cstmrJuridicalCname}, #{cstmrJuridicalRrn}, #{cstmrJuridicalBizNo}, #{cstmrJuridicalRepNm}, #{upjnCd}, #{bcuSbst}, #{cstmrJuridicalUserNm}, #{cstmrJuridicalBirth}, #{cstmrVisitTypeCd}, #{cstmrTelFnNo}, #{cstmrTelMnNo}, #{cstmrTelRnNo}, #{cstmrMobileFnNo}, #{cstmrMobileMnNo}, #{cstmrMobileRnNo}, #{cstmrZipcd}, #{cstmrAdr}, #{cstmrAdrDtl}, #{cstmrAdrBjd}, #{cstmrEmailAdr}, #{cstmrEmailReceiveYn}, #{cstmrReceiveTelFnNo}, #{cstmrReceiveTelNmNo}, #{cstmrReceiveTelRnNo} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_AGENT ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, MINOR_AGENT_NM, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_BIRTH, MINOR_AGENT_GENDER_CD, MINOR_AGENT_REL_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN_NO, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN_NO, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN_NO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_CI_INFO, JRDCL_AGENT_NM, JRDCL_AGENT_RRN, JRDCL_AGENT_REL_TYPE_CD, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN_NO, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN_NO, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN_NO ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{minorAgentNm}, #{minorAgentRrn}, #{minorAgentBirth}, #{minorAgentGenderCd}, #{minorAgentRelTypeCd}, #{minorAgentTelFnNo}, #{minorAgentTelMnNo}, #{minorAgentTelRnNo}, #{minorAgentAgrmYn}, #{minorAgentSelfInqryAgrmYn}, #{minorAgentSelfCertTypeCd}, #{minorAgentCiInfo}, #{jrdclAgentNm}, #{jrdclAgentRrn}, #{jrdclAgentRelTypeCd}, #{jrdclAgentTelFnNo}, #{jrdclAgentTelMnNo}, #{jrdclAgentTelRnNo} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_ADDITION ( REQUEST_KEY, ADDITION_ID, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, ADDITION_KEY, ADDITION_NM, SVC_CHG_TYPE_CD, PROD_ID, PROD_NM, ADDTION_INFO, RANTAL, PROC_YN ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{additionId}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{additionKey}, #{additionNm}, #{svcChgTypeCd}, #{prodId}, #{prodNm}, #{addtionInfo}, #{rantal}, #{procYn} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_BILL_REQ ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_ID, AMD_DT, REQ_PAY_TYPE_CD, REQ_BANK_CD, REQ_ACCOUNT_NM, REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN, REQ_ACCOUNT_REL_TYPE_CD, REQ_ACCOUNT_NO, REQ_CARD_NM, REQ_CARD_RRN, REQ_CARD_COMPANY_CD, REQ_CARD_NO, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_WIRE_TYPE_CD, OTHERS_PAYMENT_YN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_TEL_FN_NO, OTHERS_PAYMENT_TEL_MN_NO, OTHERS_PAYMENT_TEL_RN_NO, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_REL_TYPE_CD, OTHERS_PAYMENT_REQ_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AGR_YN, PRNTS_BILL_NO, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, #{amdId}, NOW(), #{reqPayTypeCd}, #{reqBankCd}, #{reqAccountNm}, #{reqAccountRrn}, #{reqAccountRelTypeCd}, #{reqAccountNo}, #{reqCardNm}, #{reqCardRrn}, #{reqCardCompanyCd}, #{reqCardNo}, #{reqCardYy}, #{reqCardMm}, #{reqWireTypeCd}, #{othersPaymentYn}, #{othersPaymentTelFnNo}, #{othersPaymentTelMnNo}, #{othersPaymentTelRnNo}, #{othersPaymentNm}, #{othersPaymentRrn}, #{othersPaymentRelTypeCd}, #{othersPaymentReqNm}, 'N', #{prntsBillNo}, #{cstmrBillSendTypeCd}, #{cstmrEmailAdr} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_CLAUSE ( REQUEST_KEY, CD_GROUP_ID, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, VERSION ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cdGroupId}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{version} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_DOC ( REQUEST_DOC_SEQ, REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, FILE_TYPE_CD, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_NM ) VALUES ( #{requestDocSeq}, #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{fileTypeCd}, #{filePathNm}, #{fileNm} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_DVC_CHG ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, REG_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, DVC_CHG_TYPE_CD, DVC_CHG_RSN_CD, DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD, INSTAMT_PAY_MTHD_CD ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{dvcChgTypeCd}, #{dvcChgRsnCd}, #{dvcChgRsnDtlCd}, #{instamtPayMthdCd} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_JOIN_FORM ( REQUEST_RECV_SEQ, REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_ID, AMD_DT, RECV_TYPE_CD, FAX_NO, CSTMR_ZIPCD, CSTMR_ADR, CSTMR_ADR_DTL, CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR, CSTMR_MOBILE_NO, PROC_CD, ETC_MEMO ) VALUES ( #{requestRecvSeq}, #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, #{amdId}, NOW(), #{recvTypeCd}, #{faxNo}, #{cstmrZipcd}, #{cstmrAdr}, #{cstmrAdrDtl}, #{cstmrEmailAdr}, #{cstmrMobileNo}, #{procCd}, #{etcMemo} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_MOVE ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, REG_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_ID, AMD_DT, MOVE_COMPANY_CD, MOVE_MOBILE_FN_NO, MOVE_MOBILE_MN_NO, MOVE_MOBILE_RN_NO, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE_CD, MOVE_AUTH_NO, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE_CD, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STTUS_CD, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_YN, REQ_GUIDE_YN, REQ_GUIDE_FN_NO, REQ_GUIDE_RN_NO, REQ_GUIDE_MN_NO, OSST_PAY_DATE, OSST_PAY_TYPE_CD, MOVE_PENALTY ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, #{amdId}, NOW(), #{moveCompanyCd}, #{moveMobileFnNo}, #{moveMobileMnNo}, #{moveMobileRnNo}, #{moveAuthTypeCd}, #{moveAuthNo}, #{moveThismonthPayTypeCd}, #{moveAllotmentSttusCd}, #{moveRefundAgreeYn}, #{reqGuideYn}, #{reqGuideFnNo}, #{reqGuideRnNo}, #{reqGuideMnNo}, #{osstPayDate}, #{osstPayTypeCd}, #{movePenalty} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_MST ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, REQ_TYPE_CD, USER_ID, CSTMR_NM, MOBILE_NO, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CONTRACT_NUM, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE_CD, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, ETC_MOBILE_NO ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{reqTypeCd}, #{userId}, #{cstmrNm}, #{mobileNo}, #{cstmrNativeRrn}, #{contractNum}, #{cstmrTypeCd}, #{onlineAuthTypeCd}, #{onlineAuthInfo}, #{etcMobileNo} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_NAME_CHG ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_NM, AGENT_CD, AGENT_NM, SHOP_CD, SHOP_NM, REAL_SHOP_NM, CPNT_ID, CPNT_NM, CNTPNT_SHOP_CD, CNTPNT_SHOP_NM, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, MCN_RES_NO, IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_CSTMR_NM, KNOTE_IDENTITY_ESS_NO, KNOTE_IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_DT, KNOTE_SCAN_ID, FATH_TRG_YN, FATH_TRG_IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, FATH_TRANSAC_ID, FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DATE, FATH_TEL_NO, FATH_MOBILE_FN_NO, FATH_MOBILE_MN_NO, FATH_MOBILE_RN_NO, AUTH_INFO, IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_ISSU_DATE, IDENTITY_ISSU_REGION, SELF_ISSU_NO, DRIVE_LICNS_NO, REQ_INFO_CHG_YN, SOC, SOC_NM, SOC_BASE_CHRG_AMT, JEHU_PROD_TYPE_CD, USIM_SUCC_YN, USIM_SN, ICC_ID, EID, IMEI1, IMEI2, ESIM_PHONE_ID, UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO, REMAIN_PAY_DIV_CD, CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_YN, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_YN, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_YN, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_YN, CLAUSE_JEHU_YN, CLAUSE_FINANCE_YN, PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE_YN, OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE_YN, CLAUSE_FATH_YN, MCN_STAT_RSN_CD, MEMO, REG_DATE, REGST_ID, REG_DT, PROC_DT, PROC_CD, MCN_STATE_CD, RCV_CUST_NO, RCV_BILL_ACNT_NO, REC_YN, RES_CD, RES_MSG, SCAN_ID, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN, FILE_NM, FILE_MASK_NM ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{managerCd}, #{managerNm}, #{agentCd}, #{agentNm}, #{shopCd}, #{shopNm}, #{realShopNm}, #{cpntId}, #{cpntNm}, #{cntpntShopCd}, #{cntpntShopNm}, #{operTypeCd}, #{cstmrTypeCd}, #{mcnResNo}, #{identityCertTypeCd}, #{knoteIdentityScanCstmrNm}, #{knoteIdentityEssNo}, #{knoteIdentityTypeCd}, #{knoteIdentityScanDt}, #{knoteScanId}, #{fathTrgYn}, #{fathTrgIdentityCertTypeCd}, #{fathTransacId}, #{fathCmpltNtfyDate}, #{fathTelNo}, #{fathMobileFnNo}, #{fathMobileMnNo}, #{fathMobileRnNo}, #{authInfo}, #{identityTypeCd}, #{identityIssuDate}, #{identityIssuRegion}, #{selfIssuNo}, #{driveLicnsNo}, #{reqInfoChgYn}, #{soc}, #{socNm}, #{socBaseChrgAmt}, #{jehuProdTypeCd}, #{usimSuccYn}, #{usimSn}, #{iccId}, #{eid}, #{imei1}, #{imei2}, #{esimPhoneId}, #{uploadPhoneSrlNo}, #{remainPayDivCd}, #{clauseCntrDelYn}, #{clausePriCollectYn}, #{clausePriOfferYn}, #{clauseEssCollectYn}, #{clauseConfidenceYn}, #{clausePriAdYn}, #{clauseJehuYn}, #{clauseFinanceYn}, #{personalInfoCollectAgreeYn}, #{othersTrnsAgreeYn}, #{othersTrnsKtAgreeYn}, #{othersAdReceiveAgreeYn}, #{clauseFathYn}, #{mcnStatRsnCd}, #{memo}, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), #{regstId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{procCd}, #{mcnStateCd}, #{rcvCustNo}, #{rcvBillAcntNo}, #{recYn}, #{resCd}, #{resMsg}, #{scanId}, #{appFormYn}, #{appFormXmlYn}, #{fileNm}, #{fileMaskNm} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_NAME_TRNS ( REQUEST_KEY, NFL_CHG_TRNS_SEQ, TRNS_SEQ, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, TRNS_CSTMR_TYPE_CD, TRNS_TRNSFE_MOBILE_NO, IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_CSTMR_NM, KNOTE_IDENTITY_ESS_NO, KNOTE_IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_DT, KNOTE_SCAN_ID, FATH_TRG_YN, FATH_TRG_IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, FATH_TRANSAC_ID, FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DATE, FATH_TEL_NO, FATH_MOBILE_FN_NO, FATH_MOBILE_MN_NO, FATH_MOBILE_RN_NO, AUTH_INFO, IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_ISSU_DATE, IDENTITY_ISSU_REGION, SELF_ISSU_NO, DRIVE_LICNS_NO, TRNS_NM, TRNS_MOBILE_NO, TRNS_PHONE_NO, TRNS_PWD, TRNS_MYSLF_CONF_METH_CD, TRNS_TRNSFE_NM, CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_NM, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_BIRTH, MINOR_AGENT_GENDER_CD, MINOR_AGENT_REL_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN_NO, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN_NO, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN_NO, MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE_CD, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DATE, MINOR_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NO, TRNS_STTUS_CD, AUTH_DEL_YN, CONFIRM_MEMO ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{nflChgTrnsSeq}, #{trnsSeq}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{trnsCstmrTypeCd}, #{trnsTrnsfeMobileNo}, #{identityCertTypeCd}, #{knoteIdentityScanCstmrNm}, #{knoteIdentityEssNo}, #{knoteIdentityTypeCd}, #{knoteIdentityScanDt}, #{knoteScanId}, #{fathTrgYn}, #{fathTrgIdentityCertTypeCd}, #{fathTransacId}, #{fathCmpltNtfyDate}, #{fathTelNo}, #{fathMobileFnNo}, #{fathMobileMnNo}, #{fathMobileRnNo}, #{authInfo}, #{identityTypeCd}, #{identityIssuDate}, #{identityIssuRegion}, #{selfIssuNo}, #{driveLicnsNo}, #{trnsNm}, #{trnsMobileNo}, #{trnsPhoneNo}, #{trnsPwd}, #{trnsMyslfConfMethCd}, #{trnsTrnsfeNm}, #{cstmrVisitTypeCd}, #{minorAgentNm}, #{minorAgentRrn}, #{minorAgentBirth}, #{minorAgentGenderCd}, #{minorAgentRelTypeCd}, #{minorAgentTelFnNo}, #{minorAgentTelMnNo}, #{minorAgentTelRnNo}, #{minorAgentAgrmYn}, #{minorAgentSelfInqryAgrmYn}, #{minorAgentSelfCertTypeCd}, #{minorAgentSelfIssuExprDate}, #{minorAgentSelfIssuNo}, #{trnsSttusCd}, #{authDelYn}, #{confirmMemo} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_REC ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, REC_FILE_PATH_NM, REC_FILE_NM ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{recFilePathNm}, #{recFileNm} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_SALE ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_ID, AMD_DT, MODEL_ID, MODEL_MONTHLY, MODEL_INSTAMT, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CD, MODEL_PRICE_VAT, MODEL_DISCOUNT1, MODEL_SPRT, MODEL_PRICE, MODEL_DISCOUNT3, REAL_MDL_INSTAMT, HNDSET_SALE_PRICE, SPRT_TYPE_CD, DC_AMT, MAX_APD_SPRT, ADD_DC_AMT, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, RECYCLE_YN, USIM_PRICE_TYPE_CD, USIM_PRICE, USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, SESPLS_YN, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE_CD, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, JOIN_PRICE, SOC_CODE, SOC_NM, SOC_BASE_CHRG_AMT ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, #{amdId}, NOW(), #{modelId}, #{modelMonthly}, #{modelInstamt}, #{modelSalePolicyCd}, #{modelPriceVat}, #{modelDiscount1}, #{modelSprt}, #{modelPrice}, #{modelDiscount3}, #{realMdlInstamt}, #{hndsetSalePrice}, #{sprtTypeCd}, #{dcAmt}, #{maxApdSprt}, #{addDcAmt}, #{enggMnthCnt}, #{recycleYn}, #{usimPriceTypeCd}, #{usimPrice}, #{usimPayMthdCd}, #{sesplsYn}, #{joinPriceTypeCd}, #{joinPayMthdCd}, #{joinPrice}, #{socCode}, #{socNm}, #{socBaseChrgAmt} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_STATE ( REQUEST_STATE_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, REQUEST_KEY, RES_NO, SBSC_PRO_CD, OPEN_NO, MEMO, VIEW_YN ) VALUES ( #{requestStateKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{requestKey}, #{resNo}, #{sbscProCd}, #{openNo}, #{memo}, #{viewYn} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_SVC_CHG_DTL ( REQUEST_SVC_CHG_DTL_SEQ, REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, SVC_TGT_CD, PROC_TYPE_CD, SOC_CD, SOC_NM, ADDTION_INFO, PROD_AMT, INSR_CD, CLAUSE_INSURANCE_YN, CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_YN, INSR_AUTH_INFO, USIM_BUY_TYPE_CD, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_USIM_NM, ICC_ID, EID, IMEI1, IMEI2, ESIM_PHONE_ID, UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO, PRNTS_TGT_TYPE_CD, PRNTS_MOBILE_NO, PRNTS_CONTRACT_NUM, PRNTS_CSTMR_NM, PRNTS_CSTMR_BIRTH, PRNTS_CSTMR_GENDER_CD, PRNTS_SOC_CD, PRNTS_SOC_NM, PRNTS_PROD_ID, PRNTS_PROD_NM, COMBINE_ID, COMBINE_SOLO_TYPE_YN, COMBINE_SOLO_YN, SCAN_ID, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN, FILE_NM, FILE_MASK_NM ) VALUES ( #{requestSvcChgDtlSeq}, #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{svcTgtCd}, #{procTypeCd}, #{socCd}, #{socNm}, #{addtionInfo}, #{prodAmt}, #{insrCd}, #{clauseInsuranceYn}, #{clauseInsrProdYn}, #{insrAuthInfo}, #{usimBuyTypeCd}, #{reqUsimSn}, #{reqUsimNm}, #{iccId}, #{eid}, #{imei1}, #{imei2}, #{esimPhoneId}, #{uploadPhoneSrlNo}, #{prntsTgtTypeCd}, #{prntsMobileNo}, #{prntsContractNum}, #{prntsCstmrNm}, #{prntsCstmrBirth}, #{prntsCstmrGenderCd}, #{prntsSocCd}, #{prntsSocNm}, #{prntsProdId}, #{prntsProdNm}, #{combineId}, #{combineSoloTypeYn}, #{combineSoloYn}, #{scanId}, #{appFormYn}, #{appFormXmlYn}, #{fileNm}, #{fileMaskNm} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_SVC_CHG ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_NM, AGENT_CD, AGENT_NM, SHOP_CD, SHOP_NM, REAL_SHOP_NM, CPNT_ID, CPNT_NM, CNTPNT_SHOP_CD, CNTPNT_SHOP_NM, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, CHG_MOBILE_NO, CHG_CONTRACT_NUM, MEMO, REG_DATE, REGST_ID, REG_DT, PROC_DT, PROC_CD, REC_YN, RES_CD, RES_MSG, RES_NO, SCAN_ID, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN, FILE_NM, FILE_MASK_NM ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{managerCd}, #{managerNm}, #{agentCd}, #{agentNm}, #{shopCd}, #{shopNm}, #{realShopNm}, #{cpntId}, #{cpntNm}, #{cntpntShopCd}, #{cntpntShopNm}, #{cstmrTypeCd}, #{chgMobileNo}, #{chgContractNum}, #{memo}, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), #{regstId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{procCd}, #{recYn}, #{resCd}, #{resMsg}, #{resNo}, #{scanId}, #{appFormYn}, #{appFormXmlYn}, #{fileNm}, #{fileMaskNm} )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_NM, AGENT_CD, AGENT_NM, SHOP_CD, SHOP_NM, REAL_SHOP_NM, CPNT_ID, CPNT_NM, CNTPNT_SHOP_CD, CNTPNT_SHOP_NM, REQ_BUY_TYPE_CD, OPEN_TYPE_CD, SERVICE_TYPE_CD, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_CSTMR_NM, KNOTE_IDENTITY_ESS_NO, KNOTE_IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_DT, KNOTE_SCAN_ID, FATH_TRG_YN, FATH_TRG_IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, FATH_TRANSAC_ID, FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DATE, FATH_TEL_NO, FATH_MOBILE_FN_NO, FATH_MOBILE_MN_NO, FATH_MOBILE_RN_NO, AUTH_INFO, IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_ISSU_DATE, IDENTITY_ISSU_REGION, SELF_ISSU_NO, DRIVE_LICNS_NO, OPEN_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, PROD_TYPE_CD, PROD_ID, PROD_NM, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_MODEL_NM, SNTY_CAPAC_CD, SNTY_COLOR_CD, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, SHOP_USM_ID, USIM_KINDS_CD, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_USIM_NM, EID, IMEI1, IMEI2, ESIM_PHONE_ID, UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO, REQ_WANT_FN_NO, REQ_WANT_MN_NO, REQ_WANT_RN_NO, INSR_CD, #{managerNm}, #{agentCd}, #{agentNm}, #{shopCd}, #{shopNm}, #{realShopNm}, #{cpntId}, #{cpntNm}, #{cntpntShopCd}, #{cntpntShopNm}, #{reqBuyTypeCd}, #{openTypeCd}, #{serviceTypeCd}, #{operTypeCd}, #{cstmrTypeCd}, #{identityCertTypeCd}, #{knoteIdentityScanCstmrNm}, #{knoteIdentityEssNo}, #{knoteIdentityTypeCd}, #{knoteIdentityScanDt}, #{knoteScanId}, #{fathTrgYn}, #{fathTrgIdentityCertTypeCd},
